input.title: useMultiline: Not updated when context subthought is edited
input.body:
## Steps to Reproduce

```
- a
  - m
    - Edit this between one and two lines
- b
  - m
    - y
```

1. Activate context view on a/m
2. Edit the long thought ("Edit this between...") so that it changes from one to two lines (or two to one). 

## Current Behavior

Line height (determined by `useMultine`) is updated after a short delay. 

## Expected Behavior

Line height should update immediately when the thought height is measured.
